notes: Amyloid precursor protein; cleaved to Abeta; Mendelian autosomal-dominant early-onset AD and duplications.
Presenilin-1; catalytic subunit of gamma-secretase cleaving APP; most common Mendelian EOAD gene.
Presenilin-2; gamma-secretase subunit; rarer Mendelian autosomal-dominant EOAD.
Alpha-secretase; non-amyloidogenic APP cleavage; rare AD-associated coding variants.
Microtubule-associated protein tau; forms neurofibrillary tangles; Mendelian in FTD-tau; 17q21 haplotype.
Apolipoprotein E; e4 is the strongest common AD risk allele; lipid and cholesterol transport
Clusterin/ApoJ; lipid transport chaperone; GWAS AD risk; also linked to Abeta clearance.
ATP-binding cassette lipid transporter; strong GWAS locus; lipid homeostasis and phagocytosis.
ATP-binding cassette lipid transporter; cholesterol efflux and APOE lipidation; AD risk variants.
Sortilin-related receptor; APP trafficking and retromer-mediated sorting; both Mendelian-like and common AD variants.
Triggering receptor expressed on myeloid cells 2; microglial sensing/phagocytosis; rare high-risk coding variants (R47H).
Phospholipase C gamma 2; TREM2-downstream microglial signaling; protective P522R variant.
ABI family member 3; microglial actin/phagocytosis regulator; rare AD coding variant.
SHIP1 inositol phosphatase; myeloid/microglial signaling downstream of immune receptors; GWAS locus.
Siglec-3 sialic-acid receptor on microglia; modulates phagocytosis; GWAS AD risk/protective splice variant.
Membrane-spanning 4A cluster; myeloid/microglial expression; GWAS AD locus (MS4A region).
Membrane-spanning 4A cluster; regulates soluble TREM2; myeloid immune GWAS locus.
PU.1 master myeloid transcription factor; sets microglial gene expression; AD GWAS locus.
MHC class II; adaptive/innate immune antigen presentation; AD GWAS locus in MHC region.
Complement receptor 1; complement-mediated clearance of Abeta and immune complexes; GWAS AD locus.
SLP adaptor and CSK-interacting membrane protein; microglial TLR/immune signaling; AD GWAS locus.
TSPO-associated protein 1; myeloid/immune associated locus near BZRAP1; AD GWAS.
Bridging integrator 1; clathrin-mediated endocytosis and membrane remodeling; 2nd strongest common AD locus.
Phosphatidylinositol-binding clathrin assembly protein; clathrin-mediated endocytosis; strong AD GWAS locus.
CD2-associated protein; endocytic cytoskeletal adaptor; AD GWAS locus.
Protein tyrosine kinase 2 beta (Pyk2); endocytosis/synaptic signaling; AD GWAS locus.
Kindlin-2; integrin adhesion and APP metabolism/endocytosis; AD GWAS locus.
Ras and Rab interactor 3; early-endosome trafficking (BIN1/RAB5 pathway); AD GWAS locus.
Ephrin type-A receptor 1; receptor endocytosis and immune trafficking; AD GWAS locus.
Cas scaffold protein family member 4; cytoskeletal/endocytic adaptor signaling; AD GWAS locus.
Angiotensin-converting enzyme; renin-angiotensin/vascular regulation
column4: also Abeta degradation; AD GWAS locus.

notes: ADAM metallopeptidase with thrombospondin motifs 1; extracellular matrix/vascular remodeling; AD GWAS locus.
WW domain oxidoreductase; lipid/steroid metabolism and tau interaction; AD GWAS locus.
Sodium/potassium/calcium exchanger; neuronal calcium homeostasis; AD GWAS locus.
Contactin-associated protein 2; neuronal cell adhesion and synapse organization; neurodevelopmental/AD-associated.
Lysine acetyltransferase 8 (MOF); histone H4K16 acetylation; chromatin regulation; AD GWAS locus (17q21).
Zinc finger CW-type PWWP domain 1; histone-mark epigenetic reader; AD GWAS locus.
CUGBP Elav-like family member 1; RNA-binding post-transcriptional regulation; AD GWAS locus (11p11 SPI1 region).
IQ motif containing K; function poorly characterized; AD GWAS locus with uncertain mechanism.
Enoyl-CoA hydratase domain containing 3; possible fatty-acid metabolism but mechanism in AD uncertain.
NME/NM23 family member 8 (thioredoxin domain); axonemal/ciliary role; AD GWAS locus with uncertain mechanism.
